codeReview.summary: The fix adequately resolves the prior blocking scrutiny failure (VAL-PW-006) by adding an explicit post-approval output assertion in the approve path. Compared to the original failed commit (2301292932658cbf5486b47b36aced6cac6c87a8), the updated commit (a13ec9110171e21ba5279a354b81e2e04c067c6c) renames the test to intent-aligned wording and adds concrete completion evidence checks at tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts:150-176, specifically approvalCard expansion plus visible 'E2E approval' output at lines 174-175 after clicking Approve and confirming control removal.

summary: Pass.
